prestazioni: Replacement of the original 3.4L XK6 inline-6 engine (engine code: XK6-3.4) with a fully balanced and blueprinted version featuring a forged crankshaft from Arrow Precision, forged Mahle pistons (8.0:1 compression ratio), and titanium connecting rods from Carillo, paired with a custom dry-sump lubrication system by Peterson Fluid Systems (4-stage pump, 12-quart capacity) to eliminate oil starvation during high-G cornering.

Installation of a custom-built Weber 48 IDA carburetor setup with velocity stacks and a bespoke intake manifold designed by Lynx Engineering, optimized for 12,000 RPM redline and tuned for 320+ HP at 6,000 RPM with 100-octane aviation fuel, coupled with a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust system by Janspeed, featuring equal-length primaries and a straight-through muffler for maximum scavenging.

Chassis reinforcement via a T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices, integrated with a custom aluminum fuel cell (22-gallon capacity) by ATL, mounted in the original tail section with a dual-pump setup (Aeromotive Stealth 340) and AN-8 braided lines, alongside a bespoke rear subframe reinforcement kit by RML Group to handle increased torque and lateral loads.
estetica: Full restoration of the original magnesium alloy body panels by RS Panels, with a custom clear-coated satin finish in British Racing Green (Porsche Classic paint code: 6808), paired with a hand-formed aluminum rear fin (D-Type Long Nose specification) by Williams & Pritchard, featuring integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling.

Replacement of the original wire-spoke wheels with a set of 16-inch magnesium alloy knock-off wheels by Borrani (model: 500M), wrapped in Avon CR6ZZ tires (5.50-16 front, 6.50-16 rear) for period-correct grip, complemented by a custom leather-wrapped Moto-Lita steering wheel (3-inch dished, suede rim) and a full Smiths Instruments gauge cluster (revised for 10,000 RPM tachometer).

Installation of a custom aerodynamic package by Aerodyn, including a front splitter with integrated brake ducts (carbon fiber construction), a rear diffuser with vortex generators, and a removable hardtop (fiberglass, D-Type XKSS specification) with a Perspex rear window, all finished in a matte black contrast to the body color.
